---
title: "Polycopié"
subtitle: "Notes de cours et chapitres au format PDF"
toc: false
---

::: {.casc-info-banner}
{{< bi book-half >}}

Polycopié rédigé par **Urbain Vaes**. Téléchargez le document complet ou consultez chaque chapitre individuellement.
:::

[{{< bi file-earmark-pdf-fill >}} Notes complètes (PDF)](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/main.pdf){.casc-btn .casc-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

## [Chapitres]{.casc-section-title}

::: {.casc-chapters-grid}

- [**0** Introduction](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/introduction.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**1** Floating point arithmetic](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/roundoff.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**2** Interpolation and approximation](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/interpolation_approximation.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**3** Numerical integration](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/numerical_integration.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**4** Solving linear equations](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/linear_equations.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**5** Solving nonlinear equations](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/nonlinear_equations.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**6** Eigenvalues and eigenvectors](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/eigenproblems.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**7** Numerical integration of ODEs](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/odes.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**8** Numerical optimization](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/optimization.pdf){target="_blank"}

:::

## [Annexes]{.casc-section-title}

::: {.casc-chapters-grid .appendix}

- [**A** Linear algebra](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/matrices.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**B** Introduction to Julia](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/julia.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**C** Chebyshev polynomials](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/chebyshev.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [**Bib** Bibliography](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/references.pdf){target="_blank"}

:::
